name: Dark Premium
description: After-dark masculine connoisseur luxury — dark-mode-native + gold accent + serif + dramatic spotlight composition cho COLLECTIBLE LUXURY PRODUCTS trong cellar/lounge/showcase setting. Whisky/cognac, watches, men's jewelry, luxury cars, premium cigars.

_meta.note: Layer 2 designer.json — Theme 10 Dark Premium. 6 personalities (whiskyNoir DEFAULT, cognacReserve, horologyNoir, masculineJeweler, automotiveNoir, cigarLounge). DARK-MODE NATIVE + GOLD ACCENT family + DISPLAY SERIF + DRAMATIC SPOTLIGHT. NO _baseOn inheritance — each personality is own BASE. Mixed VN/EN descriptions for human designers.

_themeContext._description: After-dark masculine connoisseur luxury — dark-mode-native + gold accent + serif + dramatic spotlight composition cho COLLECTIBLE LUXURY PRODUCTS trong cellar/lounge/showcase setting. Whisky/cognac, watches, men's jewelry, luxury cars, premium cigars.
_industries: Premium whisky/scotch/bourbon/Japanese whisky DARK PRODUCT (Macallan M Black, Yamazaki 25, Pappy Van Winkle)
Cognac/armagnac/ultra-aged tropical spirits (Louis XIII, Hennessy Paradis, Diplomático Reserva, Clase Azul Ultra)
Luxury watchmaking DARK-SPOTLIGHT (Patek Calatrava, AP Royal Oak, Rolex GMT, Hublot, Richard Mille, FP Journe)
Men's NON-WATCH jewelry (David Yurman Men, Cartier Santos bracelet, Tateossian, Rebus signet)
Luxury automotive Black Badge/Mulliner/AMR/supercar noir (RR Black Badge, Bentley Bacalar, Aston AMR, McLaren 750S, Ferrari SF90)
Premium cigar limited release / lounge venue (Cohiba Behike, Davidoff WC Limited, Padron 1964 Anniversary, Casa Fuente)

whiskyNoir._description: Theme 10 DEFAULT — premium whisky/scotch/bourbon/Japanese whisky/Irish whiskey DARK-MODE PRODUCT SHOWCASE. Bottle-spotlight, limited-edition campaigns, collector portals. Signature: jet-black + amber-gold + display serif + spacious gallery.

palette._axisDescription: Dark canvas + gold/silver/amber/leather accent family. Mỗi personality có own palette set matching product category (whisky amber, cognac mahogany, watch dual-metal, jewelry velvet+brushed-gold, auto chrome+amber+leather, cigar tobacco-amber).

amberGold._description: Jet-black ground với amber-gold accent + ivory-warm text — Scotch/Japanese craft-distillery dark product showcase. Canonical: Macallan M Black, Yamazaki 25, Glenfiddich Grande Couronne, Hibiki 30, Highland Park Viking, Balvenie Tun.
amberGold.color.primaryButton.label: #140f06
amberGold.color.secondaryButton.label: #f4ebd7
amberGold.color.tertiaryButton.label: #f4ebd7
amberGold.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #140f06
amberGold.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #f4ebd7

peatedSmoke._description: Smoke-black ground với smoke-gray accent + ember-orange highlight + ivory-cool text — peated Islay dark surface. Canonical: Lagavulin Distillers Edition dark, Laphroaig 25, Ardbeg Twenty Something, Bowmore Black.
peatedSmoke.color.primaryButton.label: #150c05
peatedSmoke.color.secondaryButton.label: #f6e4d5
peatedSmoke.color.tertiaryButton.label: #f6e4d5
peatedSmoke.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #150c05
peatedSmoke.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #f6e4d5

bourbonMahogany._description: Mahogany-tinted dark ground với bourbon-amber caramel-warmer accent + ivory-warm text — Kentucky bourbon premium collector tier. Canonical: Pappy Van Winkle 23, Buffalo Trace Antique Collection, Michter's 25, Blanton's Gold, Eagle Rare 17.
bourbonMahogany.color.primaryButton.label: #150c05
bourbonMahogany.color.secondaryButton.label: #d99559
bourbonMahogany.color.tertiaryButton.label: #d99559
bourbonMahogany.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #150c05
bourbonMahogany.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #d99559

typeface._axisDescription: Display serif headlines (transitional / didone / engraved-classical / heraldic) + restrained sans body. horologyNoir + automotiveNoir thêm technical monospace cho spec table. cigarLounge dùng condensed sans (NOT mono) cho vitola spec.

transitionalSerif._description: Heading Cormorant Garamond / Tiempos Headline / Sangbleu Kingdom transitional serif — classical-warm Scotch/Japanese craft-distillery voice. Body Söhne / Inter humanist sans. Pairs với amberGold palette mặc định.

didoneDramatic._description: Heading Bodoni / Didot / GT Super Display high-contrast didone — flagship ultra-premium modernist drama. Canonical: Macallan M Black, Hibiki 30, Pappy Van Winkle 23, Bowmore 50.

neoGroteskCondensed._description: Secondary typeface — Söhne Condensed / Inter Condensed / GT America Condensed cho cask stamps / age-statement labels / batch numbers / single-cask spec tables. Pairs WITH transitionalSerif or didoneDramatic, không standalone.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Light display default cho elegant headline drama. Regular cho body. Medium variants cho stamps/labels (mediumStamp whisky+cognac cask + auto VIN, mediumDial watch dial-marker, mediumEngraved jewelry+cognac engraved, mediumBandStamp cigar-band).

lightDisplay._description: Headings 200-300 light cho elegant high-contrast display drama, body 400 regular, emphasis 500 medium. Pairs với didone/transitional serif.

regular._description: Headings 500 medium, body 400 regular, emphasis 600 semibold. Classical body legibility on dark canvas.

mediumStamp._description: Headings 500 medium, body 400, emphasis 700 — cho cask-mark / age-statement label / batch-number / lot-number stamp typography (whisky+cognac+auto VIN/commission/chassis number).

density._axisDescription: Spacious gallery (168px) default cho single-hero showcase. Extreme cinematic (200px+) cho flagship cinematic hero. SpecGrid (88px) cho spec tables. CollectionGrid + detailMacroGrid (128px) cho gallery views. Configurator (104px) cho auto bespoke.

spaciousGallery._description: Section padding 168px desktop, 104px mobile. Single-hero bottle/decanter/product trên dark canvas với generous negative space — dramatic spotlight composition.

specGrid._description: Section padding 88px desktop, 56px mobile. Compact 2-3 column spec table — whisky cask spec / cognac vintage-year / watch case-mm-WR-PR / auto HP-torque-0-60.

extremeShowcase._description: Section padding 200px+ desktop, 128px mobile. Cinematic flagship hero — bottle/decanter occupies full viewport (Macallan M Black, Hibiki 30, Louis XIII Black Pearl, Hennessy Richard Hennessy).

silhouette._axisDescription: Sharp (1px) default — modernist editorial drama. Refined-sharp (2px) cho craft-tobacco warmth. Engraved variants (0px + gold/metallic outline) cho flagship engraved-metal / engraved-crystal / heraldic / cigar-band aesthetics. Soft (4px) cho modern American jewelry. Chamfered + stealthRounded cho automotive aero/stealth.

sharp._description: Cards 1px, buttons 1px, inputs 1px — modernist editorial drama matching bottle/dial/car geometric precision.

refinedSharp._description: Cards 2px, buttons 2px, inputs 2px — slightly warmer than pure sharp, cho craft-distillery/jewelry-velvet/tobacco-warm tones.

engraved._description: Cards 0px + 1px gold-outline border, buttons 0px + thin-gold-outline — engraved-metal label texture cho flagship editions (Macallan M Black engraved decanter, Hibiki 30 engraved).

cognacReserve._description: Cognac/armagnac/ultra-aged tropical spirits DARK PRODUCT SHOWCASE — French haute aristocratic-maison hoặc tropical-aged reserve. Signature: mahogany-cognac + didone Bodoni/Didot/Sangbleu Empire + crystal-engraved decanter hero.

palette._axisDescription: Dark canvas + gold/silver/amber/leather accent family. Mỗi personality có own palette set matching product category (whisky amber, cognac mahogany, watch dual-metal, jewelry velvet+brushed-gold, auto chrome+amber+leather, cigar tobacco-amber).

mahoganyCognac._description: Mahogany-tinted dark ground với cognac-gold (deeper-warmer-pink-gold than whisky amber) + warm-amber text — French cognac haute aristocratic-maison. Canonical: Louis XIII, Hennessy Paradis Imperial, Martell Cordon Bleu, Delamain Pléiade, Frapin 1888.

masculineJeweler._description: Men's NON-WATCH jewelry — signet rings/cufflinks/bracelets/chains/necklaces/pendants/wedding bands on dark velvet. Signature: black-velvet + brushed-gold + saddle-leather + Trajan/Garamond engraved-classical serif (NO technical mono).

palette._axisDescription: Dark canvas + gold/silver/amber/leather accent family. Mỗi personality có own palette set matching product category (whisky amber, cognac mahogany, watch dual-metal, jewelry velvet+brushed-gold, auto chrome+amber+leather, cigar tobacco-amber).

velvetBrushedGold._description: Black-velvet ground (deeper than jet-black with subtle texture signal) với brushed-gold (matte warm-gold, NOT bright chrome) + saddle-leather-brown accent + ivory text — men's-jewelry velvet showcase. Canonical: David Yurman Men, Tateossian, Cartier Santos bracelet, Bvlgari B.zero1 Men, Boucheron Quatre Men.

typeface._axisDescription: Display serif headlines (transitional / didone / engraved-classical / heraldic) + restrained sans body. horologyNoir + automotiveNoir thêm technical monospace cho spec table. cigarLounge dùng condensed sans (NOT mono) cho vitola spec.

geometricSerifMono._description: Heading Bodoni / Engravers MT / GT Sectra didone-style + JetBrains Mono spec — British luxury auto dark-surface canonical (RR Black Badge / Bentley Mulliner / Aston AMR + spec HP/torque/0-60/top-speed).

modernSerifMonoAuto._description: Heading Tiempos Headline / Sangbleu Kingdom / GT Super modernist serif + JetBrains Mono spec — Italian supercar + contemporary modernist luxury auto (Ferrari modern, Pagani, Lamborghini, newer McLaren).

neoGroteskMonoAuto._description: Heading + body Söhne / Inter / GT America neo-grotesk + JetBrains Mono spec — stealth-modern hypercar boutique (Rimac / Koenigsegg / Czinger / SSC / Pininfarina) + electric performance.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Light display default cho elegant headline drama. Regular cho body. Medium variants cho stamps/labels (mediumStamp whisky+cognac cask + auto VIN, mediumDial watch dial-marker, mediumEngraved jewelry+cognac engraved, mediumBandStamp cigar-band).

lightDisplay._description: Headings 200-300 light cho elegant high-contrast display drama, body 400 regular, emphasis 500 medium. Pairs với didone/transitional serif.

regular._description: Headings 500 medium, body 400 regular, emphasis 600 semibold. Classical body legibility on dark canvas.

mediumStamp._description: Headings 500 medium, body 400, emphasis 700 — cho cask-mark / age-statement label / batch-number / lot-number stamp typography (whisky+cognac+auto VIN/commission/chassis number).

density._axisDescription: Spacious gallery (168px) default cho single-hero showcase. Extreme cinematic (200px+) cho flagship cinematic hero. SpecGrid (88px) cho spec tables. CollectionGrid + detailMacroGrid (128px) cho gallery views. Configurator (104px) cho auto bespoke.

extremeSpaciousCinematic._description: Section padding 200px+ desktop, 128px mobile. Cinematic car hero với three-quarter hoặc low-angle shot, full-viewport (automotiveNoir Bentley Bacalar, RR Black Badge, Aston Vantage AMR, McLaren 750S, Ferrari Daytona SP3).

specGrid._description: Section padding 88px desktop, 56px mobile. Compact 2-3 column spec table — whisky cask spec / cognac vintage-year / watch case-mm-WR-PR / auto HP-torque-0-60.

configuratorGrid._description: Section padding 104px desktop, 72px mobile. Bespoke configurator multi-cell options grid (RR Bespoke / Bentley Mulliner / Aston Q / Pagani Codalunga / McLaren MSO — color/material/wheel/interior trim).

silhouette._axisDescription: Sharp (1px) default — modernist editorial drama. Refined-sharp (2px) cho craft-tobacco warmth. Engraved variants (0px + gold/metallic outline) cho flagship engraved-metal / engraved-crystal / heraldic / cigar-band aesthetics. Soft (4px) cho modern American jewelry. Chamfered + stealthRounded cho automotive aero/stealth.

sharp._description: Cards 1px, buttons 1px, inputs 1px — modernist editorial drama matching bottle/dial/car geometric precision.

chamfered._description: Cards 1px + chamfer-edge accent on key UI — performance aero bodywork extreme-angular geometry (automotiveNoir Aston Valkyrie / McLaren Senna / Ferrari SF90 XX / Pagani Huayra R / Lamborghini Huracán STO).

stealthRounded._description: Cards 4px, buttons 4px — softer than sharp default, stealth blackout dark-luxury softness (automotiveNoir RR Black Badge stealth / Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series stealth / Mansory blackout).

cigarLounge._description: Premium cigar dark-lounge consumption — single-hero limited release OR lounge venue surface. DISTINCT from 06.cigarHouse (cream/classical/ornamental). Signature: smoke-black + tobacco-amber + brushed-gold + Trajan/Cormorant + Söhne Condensed (NOT mono) vitola spec.

palette._axisDescription: Dark canvas + gold/silver/amber/leather accent family. Mỗi personality có own palette set matching product category (whisky amber, cognac mahogany, watch dual-metal, jewelry velvet+brushed-gold, auto chrome+amber+leather, cigar tobacco-amber).

smokeTobaccoGold._description: Smoke-black ground (slightly desaturated black signaling tobacco-and-smoke setting) với tobacco-amber accent (matching cigar wrapper amber-brown leaf) + brushed-gold (matching cigar band gold) + ivory text — premium cigar dark product. Canonical: Cohiba Behike, Davidoff WC Limited, Padron 1964 Anniversary, Arturo Fuente OpusX.
